---
title: "RPC2 endothelial cells"
author: "Ye Ji Choi"
format: html
---

```{r echo = F}
library(dplyr)
library(Seurat)
library(aws.s3)
library(jsonlite)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(nebula)
library(openxlsx)
library(table1)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(Hmisc)
library(ggtext)
library(corrplot)
library(gtools)
library(foreach)
library(emmeans)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(future)
library(BiocParallel)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(scran)
library(fgsea)
library(msigdbr)
```

```{r echo = F}
user <- Sys.info()[["user"]]

if (user == "choiyej") { # local version
  root_path <- "/Users/choiyej/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-SharedLibraries-UW/Laura Pyle - Bjornstad/Biostatistics Core Shared Drive"
  git_path <- "/Users/choiyej/GitHub/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
} else if (user == "rameshsh") { # hyak version
  root_path <- ""
  git_path <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/rameshsh/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
} else if (user == "yejichoi") { # hyak version
  root_path <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/yejichoi/"
  git_path <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/yejichoi/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
  keys <- fromJSON("/mmfs1/home/yejichoi/keys.json")
} else if (user == "pylell") {
  root_path <- "/Users/pylell/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-SharedLibraries-UW/Bjornstad/Biostatistics Core Shared Drive"
  git_path <- "/Users/pylell/Documents/GitHub/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
} else {
  stop("Unknown user: please specify root path for this user.")
}

Sys.setenv(
  "AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID" = keys$MY_ACCESS_KEY,
  "AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY" = keys$MY_SECRET_KEY,
  "AWS_DEFAULT_REGION" = "",
  "AWS_REGION" = "",
  "AWS_S3_ENDPOINT" = "s3.kopah.uw.edu"
)

```

```{r echo = F}
s3read_using_region <- function(FUN, ..., object, bucket, region = NULL, opts = NULL, filename = NULL) {
  if (missing(bucket)) {
    bucket <- get_bucketname(object)
  }
  object <- get_objectkey(object)
  
  tmp <- if (is.character(filename)) {
    file.path(tempdir(TRUE), filename)
  } else {
    tempfile(fileext = paste0(".", tools::file_ext(object)))
  }
  
  on.exit(unlink(tmp))
  
  # Add region to opts if provided
  if (!is.null(region)) {
    if (is.null(opts)) {
      opts <- list(region = region)
    } else {
      opts$region <- region
    }
  }
  
  if (is.null(opts)) {
    r <- save_object(bucket = bucket, object = object, file = tmp)
  } else {
    r <- do.call("save_object", c(list(bucket = bucket, 
                                       object = object, 
                                       file = tmp), opts))
  }
  
  return(FUN(tmp, ...))
}

s3write_using_region <- function(FUN, ..., object, bucket,
                                 region = NULL, opts = NULL, filename = NULL) {
  ext  <- if (!is.null(filename)) tools::file_ext(filename) else tools::file_ext(object)
  tmp  <- tempfile(fileext = if (nchar(ext) > 0) paste0(".", ext) else "")
  on.exit(unlink(tmp))
  FUN(..., file = tmp)
  args <- list(file = tmp, object = object, bucket = bucket)
  if (!is.null(region)) args$region <- region
  if (!is.null(opts))   args        <- c(args, opts)
  do.call(aws.s3::put_object, args)
}
```

```{r echo = F}
pb90 <- s3readRDS(bucket = "scrna", object = 'data_clean/pb90_processed.rds', region = "")

# counts_layer <- round(GetAssayData(pb90, layer = "counts"))
# sce <- SingleCellExperiment(assays = list(counts = counts_layer))
# sce <- computeSumFactors(sce)
# # Calculate offset → (size factors)
# pooled_offset <- sizeFactors(sce)
# pb90$pooled_offset <- pooled_offset
# 
# s3saveRDS(pb90, bucket = "scrna", object = 'data_clean/pb90_processed.rds', region = "", multipart = T)
# subset to EC only
pb90_ec <- subset(pb90, KPMP_celltype_general == "EC")
```

```{r}
im_labels <- c(
  lv_hr                  = "LV Heart rate (1/min)",
  rvedv                  = "RV EDV (mL)",
  lvedv                  = "LV EDV (mL)",
  rvesv                  = "RV ESV (mL)",
  lvesv                  = "LV ESV (mL)",
  rv_stroke_volume       = "RV stroke\nvolume (mL)",
  lv_stroke_volume       = "LV stroke\nvolume (mL)",
  rvedv_bsa              = "RVEDV BSA (mL/m\u00b2)",
  lvedv_bsa              = "LVEDV BSA (mL/m\u00b2)",
  rvesv_bsa              = "RVESV BSA (mL/m\u00b2)",
  lvesv_bsa              = "LVESV BSA (mL/m\u00b2)",
  rv_stroke_volume_bsa   = "RV stroke\nvolume BSA (mL/m\u00b2)",
  lv_stroke_volume_bsa   = "LV stroke\nvolume BSA (mL/m\u00b2)",
  rv_cardiac_output      = "RV cardiac\noutput",
  lv_cardiac_output      = "LV cardiac\noutput",
  lves_mass              = "LV myocardial\nmass (systole)",
  lved_mass              = "LV mass (g)",
  lves_mass_bsa          = "LV myocardial\nmass BSA (systole)",
  lved_mass_bsa          = "LV mass BSA (g/m\u00b2)",
  lv_myo_thickness_total = "LV thickness\ntotal (mm)",
  lv_myo_thickness_dias  = "LV\nthickness (mm)",
  rvef                   = "RV\nejection fraction (%)",
  lvef                   = "LV\nejection fraction (%)",
  gls                    = "Global\nlongitudinal strain (%)",
  gcs                    = "Global\ncircumferential strain (%)",
  grs                    = "Global\nradial strain (%)",
  af_high5pctwss         = "Aortic wall shear\nstress (top 5%)",
  af_medianwss           = "Aortic wall shear\nstress (median)",
  af_meanwss             = "Mean wall shear\nstress (Pa)",
  af_pwv                 = "Pulse wave\nvelocity (m/s)",
  tt1                    = "CMR T1 (ms)",
  tt2                    = "CMR T2* (ms)",
  tr2                    = "R2* (1/s)",
  mv_flow_e              = "E wave (cm/s)",
  mv_flow_a              = "A wave (cm/s)",
  mv_flow_ea             = "E/A ratio"
)

# read in clinical dataset
harm_dat <- s3read_using_region(FUN = read.csv,
                                bucket = "harmonized.dataset", 
                                object = "harmonized_dataset.csv",
                                region = "",
                                na = "")

# subset to those with CMR and biopsies
im_vars <- names(im_labels)
im_vars <- intersect(im_vars, names(harm_dat))

dat <- harm_dat %>%
  dplyr::summarise(across(where(negate(is.numeric)), ~ ifelse(all(is.na(.x)), NA_character_, last(na.omit(.x)))),
                   across(where(is.numeric), ~ ifelse(all(is.na(.x)), NA_real_, mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))),
                   .by = c(mrn, visit))  %>%
  filter(if_any(all_of(im_vars), ~ !is.na(.))) %>%
  filter(visit == "baseline")

dat_bx <- dat %>%
  filter(kit_id %in% pb90_ec$kit_id)

ids <- dat_bx$kit_id

# subset PB90_EC to those with both CMRI and ECs
pb90_ec_cmr <- subset(pb90_ec, kit_id %in% ids)

# imaging columns to bring in, restricted to those actually present in dat_bx
im_vars <- intersect(names(im_labels), names(dat_bx))

# one imaging row per subject/sample (imaging is sample-level, not per-cell)
dat_im <- dat_bx %>%
  dplyr::select(kit_id, dplyr::all_of(im_vars)) %>%
  dplyr::distinct(kit_id, .keep_all = TRUE)

# align dat_im rows to each cell via kit_id, key by cell barcode, attach
add_df <- dat_im[match(pb90_ec_cmr$kit_id, dat_im$kit_id), im_vars, drop = FALSE]
rownames(add_df) <- colnames(pb90_ec_cmr)
pb90_ec_cmr <- AddMetaData(pb90_ec_cmr, metadata = add_df)
```

# Helper functions

```{r}
# ---- single-variable volcano (full styling, ported from plot_volcano) ----
plot_volcano_im <- function(data, var_name,
                            label_lookup   = im_labels,
                            fc_col = "logFC", p_col = "p", gene_col = "gene",
                            p_thresh = 0.05, n_label = 20, fc_limit = 10,
                            positive_text = "Higher expression\nat higher value",
                            negative_text = "Lower expression\nat higher value",
                            text_size = 15, geom_text_size = 3, point_size = 2.5) {
  set.seed(1); eps <- 1e-300
  d <- data
  d$.fc <- d[[fc_col]]; d$.p <- d[[p_col]]; d$.gene <- d[[gene_col]]
  d <- d %>%
    filter(abs(.fc) < fc_limit) %>%
    mutate(neg_log_p = -log10(.p + eps),
           sig = case_when(.p < p_thresh & .fc > 0 ~ "pos",
                           .p < p_thresh & .fc < 0 ~ "neg",
                           TRUE                     ~ "ns"))

  ttl <- if (var_name %in% names(label_lookup))
           gsub("\n", " ", label_lookup[[var_name]]) else var_name

  lab <- d %>% filter(sig != "ns") %>%
    group_by(dir = sign(.fc)) %>% arrange(.p, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    slice_head(n = n_label) %>% ungroup()

  y_max  <- max(d$neg_log_p, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.1
  max_fc <- max(d$.fc, na.rm = TRUE); min_fc <- min(d$.fc, na.rm = TRUE)

  ggplot(d, aes(.fc, neg_log_p)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(p_thresh), linetype = "dashed", color = "darkgrey") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "darkgrey", linewidth = 0.3) +
    geom_point(aes(color = sig), alpha = 0.5, size = point_size) +
    geom_label_repel(data = lab, aes(label = .gene, color = sig), seed = 1,
                     fontface = "bold", size = geom_text_size, max.overlaps = Inf,
                     force = 6, segment.alpha = 0.3, segment.size = 0.3,
                     box.padding = 0.3, fill = scales::alpha("white", 0.7), label.size = 0) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(pos = "#f28482", neg = "#457b9d", ns = "#ced4da")) +
    annotate("segment", x = max_fc/8, xend = max_fc*7/8, y = -y_max*0.09,
             colour = "darkgrey", arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm"))) +
    annotate("text", x = mean(c(max_fc/8, max_fc*7/8)), y = -y_max*0.15,
             label = positive_text, size = geom_text_size, colour = "#343a40") +
    annotate("segment", x = min_fc/8, xend = min_fc*7/8, y = -y_max*0.09,
             colour = "darkgrey", arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm"))) +
    annotate("text", x = mean(c(min_fc/8, min_fc*7/8)), y = -y_max*0.15,
             label = negative_text, size = geom_text_size, colour = "#343a40") +
    labs(title = ttl, x = "LogFC", y = expression(-log[10]~italic(p))) +
    scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, y_max), clip = "off") +
    guides(color = "none") +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
          text = element_text(size = text_size, family = "Arial"),
          panel.background = element_blank(), plot.background = element_blank(),
          plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 20, b = 35, l = 20),
          axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 25)))
}

# ---- combined faceted volcano ----
plot_volcano_im_facet <- function(data, label_lookup = im_labels,
                                  p_col = "p",
                                  p_thresh = 0.05, n_label = 8, fc_limit = 10,
                                  text_size = 12, geom_text_size = 2.5, point_size = 1.4) {
  set.seed(1); eps <- 1e-300
  d <- data %>%
    filter(abs(logFC) < fc_limit) %>%
    mutate(.p = .data[[p_col]],
           neg_log_p = -log10(.p + eps),
           sig = case_when(.p < p_thresh & logFC > 0 ~ "pos",
                           .p < p_thresh & logFC < 0 ~ "neg",
                           TRUE ~ "ns"))
  lab <- d %>% filter(sig != "ns") %>%
    group_by(var, dir = sign(logFC)) %>% arrange(.p, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    slice_head(n = n_label) %>% ungroup()

  y_lab <- if (identical(p_col, "fdr")) expression(-log[10]~italic(FDR))
           else expression(-log[10]~italic(p))

  ggplot(d, aes(logFC, neg_log_p)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(p_thresh), linetype = "dashed", color = "darkgrey") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "darkgrey", linewidth = 0.3) +
    geom_point(aes(color = sig), alpha = 0.5, size = point_size) +
    geom_text_repel(data = lab, aes(label = gene, color = sig), seed = 1,
                    size = geom_text_size, max.overlaps = Inf,
                    segment.alpha = 0.3, segment.size = 0.2, fontface = "bold") +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(pos = "#f28482", neg = "#457b9d", ns = "#ced4da")) +
    facet_wrap(~ var, scales = "free", labeller = labeller(var = label_lookup)) +
    labs(x = "LogFC", y = y_lab) +
    guides(color = "none") +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
          text = element_text(size = text_size, family = "Arial"),
          panel.background = element_blank(), plot.background = element_blank(),
          strip.background = element_blank(),
          strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = text_size - 2),
          panel.spacing = unit(1, "lines"))
}

# ---- ranking metric per variable ----
# default "z" = logFC/se (NEBULA Wald statistic): continuous, few ties, fgsea-friendly
make_ranks <- function(df, metric = c("z", "signed_p"), gene_col = "gene") {
  metric <- match.arg(metric)
  df %>%
    mutate(stat = if (metric == "z") logFC / se
                  else sign(logFC) * -log10(p + 1e-300)) %>%
    filter(is.finite(stat)) %>%
    group_by(.data[[gene_col]]) %>%                          # collapse dup symbols
    summarise(stat = stat[which.max(abs(stat))], .groups = "drop") %>%
    { setNames(.$stat, .[[gene_col]]) } %>%
    sort(decreasing = TRUE)
}

# ---- fgsea for one variable ----
run_gsea_var <- function(df_one, pathways, metric = "z",
                         minSize = 15, maxSize = 500) {
  ranks <- make_ranks(df_one, metric = metric)
  set.seed(1)
  fgsea(pathways = pathways, stats = ranks,
        minSize = minSize, maxSize = maxSize)
}

clean_pathway_names <- function(pathways) {
  cleaned <- gsub("^REACTOME_", "", pathways)
  cleaned <- gsub("^GOBP_", "", cleaned)
  cleaned <- gsub("^KEGG_", "", cleaned)
  cleaned <- gsub("^HALLMARK_", "", cleaned)
  cleaned <- gsub("_", " ", cleaned)
  cleaned <- tools::toTitleCase(tolower(cleaned))
  
  uppercase_words <- c(
    "\\bI\\b", "\\bIi\\b", "\\bIii\\b", "\\bIv\\b", "\\bV\\b", "\\bVi\\b",
    "\\bVii\\b", "\\bViii\\b", "\\bIx\\b", "\\bX\\b",
    "\\bTca\\b", "\\bAtp\\b", "\\bAdp\\b", "\\bAmp\\b", "\\bGtp\\b", "\\bGdp\\b",
    "\\bNad\\b", "\\bNadh\\b", "\\bFad\\b", "\\bFadh2\\b", "\\bCoa\\b",
    "\\bDna\\b", "\\bRna\\b", "\\bMrna\\b", "\\bTrna\\b", "\\bRrna\\b",
    "\\bEr\\b", "\\bUpr\\b", "\\bNf\\b", "\\bHif\\b", "\\bMhc\\b",
    "\\bTgf\\b", "\\bEgf\\b", "\\bVegf\\b", "\\bPdgf\\b", "\\bFgf\\b",
    "\\bRos\\b", "\\bRns\\b", "\\bNo\\b", "\\bNos\\b", "\\bInos\\b", "\\bEnos\\b", "\\bNnos\\b",
    "\\Mapk\\b"
  )
  
  for (pattern in uppercase_words) {
    word <- gsub("\\\\b", "", pattern)
    replacement <- toupper(word)
    cleaned <- gsub(pattern, replacement, cleaned, ignore.case = TRUE)
  }
  
  cleaned <- gsub("\\bOf\\b", "of", cleaned)
  cleaned <- gsub("\\bBy\\b", "by", cleaned)
  cleaned <- gsub("\\bThe\\b", "the", cleaned)
  cleaned <- gsub("^the", "The", cleaned)
  cleaned <- gsub("\\bO Linked\\b", "O-Linked", cleaned, ignore.case = TRUE)
  
  return(cleaned)
}

shorten_pathway_names <- function(pathway_names, max_length = 40, aggressive = FALSE) {
  word_replacements <- c(
    "Hallmark " = "",
    "Role of " = "",
    "Function of " = "",
    "Eukaryotic " = "",
    "in the" = "in",
    "by the" = "by",
    "of the" = "of",
    "Phosphorylation" = "Phosph",
    "Metabolism" = "Metab",
    "Extracellular" = "EC",
    "Intracellular" = "IC",
    "Dysfunction" = "Adaptation",
    "Alternative" = "Alt",
    "Dependent" = "Dep",
    "Independent" = "Indep",
    "Associated" = "Assoc",
    "Inflammatory" = "Inflam",
    "Inflammation" = "Inflam",
    "Lymphocyte" = "Lymph",
    "Lymphocytes" = "Lymph",
    "Fibroblast" = "Fib",
    "Fibroblasts" = "Fib",
    "Endothelial" = "Endo",
    "Epithelial" = "Epi",
    "Transition" = "Trans",
    "Rheumatoid Arthritis" = "RA",
    "Multiple Sclerosis" = "MS",
    "Alzheimer's Disease" = "Alzheimer's",
    "Parkinson's Disease" = "Parkinson's",
    "Respiratory" = "Resp",
    "Gastrointestinal" = "GI",
    "Central Nervous System" = "CNS",
    "Oxidative" = "Ox",
    "between" = "b/w",
    "through" = "via",
    "and" = "&"
  )
  
  aggressive_replacements <- c(
    " the " = " ",
    " in " = " ",
    " of " = " ",
    " to " = "\u2192",
    " from " = "\u2190"
  )
  
  molecule_replacements <- c(
    "Natural Killer" = "NK",
    "Tumor Necrosis Factor" = "TNF",
    "Transforming Growth Factor" = "TGF",
    "Platelet Derived Growth Factor" = "PDGF",
    "Epidermal Growth Factor" = "EGF",
    "Vascular Endothelial Growth Factor" = "VEGF",
    "Insulin-like Growth Factor" = "IGF",
    "Interferon" = "IFN",
    "Interleukin" = "IL",
    "G-Protein Coupled" = "GPCR",
    "G Protein Coupled" = "GPCR",
    "Activator Protein" = "AP",
    "Electron Transport" = "e- Transport",
    "Nitric Oxide" = "NO",
    "Reactive Oxygen Species" = "ROS",
    "Amino Acid" = "AA",
    "Fatty Acid" = "FA"
  )
  
  apply_replacements <- function(text, replacements) {
    for (pattern in names(replacements)) {
      text <- gsub(pattern, replacements[pattern], text, ignore.case = FALSE)
    }
    return(text)
  }
  
  step6_truncated <- rep(FALSE, length(pathway_names))
  
  shortened <- sapply(seq_along(pathway_names), function(i) {
    pathway <- pathway_names[i]
    if (is.na(pathway)) return(NA)
    
    result <- apply_replacements(pathway, molecule_replacements)
    result <- apply_replacements(result, word_replacements)
    
    if (nchar(result) > max_length && aggressive) {
      result <- apply_replacements(result, aggressive_replacements)
    }
    
    if (nchar(result) > max_length) {
      result <- gsub(" \\([^)]+\\)", "", result)
    }
    
    if (nchar(result) > max_length) {
      step6_truncated[i] <<- TRUE
      result <- paste0(substr(result, 1, max_length - 3), "...")
    }
    
    return(result)
  })
  
  return(list(
    shortened = shortened,
    step6_truncated = step6_truncated
  ))
}


make_gsea_lollipop <- function(df, logfc_col, pval_col, cell_name,
                               pathways = hallmark_sets,
                               test_name, cohort_text,
                               reference = "hallmark",
                               top_n = 20,
                               max_pathway_length = 45,
                               p_threshold = 0.05,
                               low_color = "#219ebc",
                               mid_color = "white",
                               high_color = "#d00000",
                               point_size_range = c(3, 10),
                               text_size_val = 5,
                               base_text_size = 15) {
  
  if (!logfc_col %in% names(df) || !pval_col %in% names(df)) return(NULL)
  
  # Create ranked gene list (signed -log10 p-value)
  df <- df %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data[[logfc_col]]) & !is.na(.data[[pval_col]]) & .data[[pval_col]] > 0) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(rank_stat = sign(.data[[logfc_col]]) * -log10(.data[[pval_col]]))
  
  gene_ranks <- setNames(df$rank_stat, df$Gene)
  gene_ranks <- sort(gene_ranks, decreasing = TRUE)
  gene_ranks <- gene_ranks[!duplicated(names(gene_ranks))]
  
  if (length(gene_ranks) < 10) return(NULL)
  
  # Run fgsea
  fgsea_res <- tryCatch(
    fgsea(pathways = pathways, stats = gene_ranks, minSize = 15, maxSize = 500),
    error = function(e) { message(e$message); NULL }
  )
  
  if (is.null(fgsea_res) || nrow(fgsea_res) == 0) return(NULL)
  
  # Filter significant, take top_n by p-value, then arrange by NES for display
  plot_df <- fgsea_res %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(pval)) %>%
    dplyr::filter(pval < p_threshold & NES != 0) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(pval) %>%
    head(top_n) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(NES)
  
  if (nrow(plot_df) == 0) return(NULL)
  
  # Clean pathway names and assign row number for y position
  plot_df <- plot_df %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      clean_name = clean_pathway_names(pathway),
      neg_log_p = -log10(pval),
      n = row_number(),
      text_col = ifelse(NES > 0, high_color, low_color)
    )
  
  # Shorten long names
  shorten_result <- shorten_pathway_names(plot_df$clean_name, max_length = max_pathway_length)
  plot_df$display_name <- shorten_result$shortened
  
  # Caption
  base_caption <- paste0("Cell type: ", gsub("_", " ", cell_name),
                         " | Model: ", test_name,
                         " | Cohort: ", cohort_text,
                         " | Reference: ", toupper(reference))
  
  # --- Dynamic x-axis expansion based on label lengths ---
  nes_range <- diff(range(plot_df$NES))
  if (nes_range == 0) nes_range <- 1  # guard against single-direction pathways
  
  pos_labels <- plot_df$display_name[plot_df$NES > 0]
  neg_labels <- plot_df$display_name[plot_df$NES < 0]
  
  max_pos_chars <- if (length(pos_labels) > 0) max(nchar(pos_labels)) else 0
  max_neg_chars <- if (length(neg_labels) > 0) max(nchar(neg_labels)) else 0
  
  char_to_nes <- text_size_val * 0.016
  pos_label_width <- max_pos_chars * char_to_nes
  neg_label_width <- max_neg_chars * char_to_nes
  
  nes_min <- min(plot_df$NES)
  nes_max <- max(plot_df$NES)
  total_span <- max(abs(nes_min), abs(nes_max), 1)
  
  left_expand  <- max(0.02, pos_label_width / total_span * 0.5)
  right_expand <- max(0.02, neg_label_width / total_span * 0.5)
  
  left_expand  <- min(left_expand, 0.6)
  right_expand <- min(right_expand, 0.6)
  
  # --- Build unique breaks/labels for the color legend (min, 0, max) ---
  # The key fix: explicitly set `limits` to always include 0 AND all NES values.
  # Without this, scale_color_gradient2 auto-sets limits to the data range,
  
  # which drops out-of-range breaks (e.g., 0 when all NES > 0) while keeping
  # the corresponding labels, causing the breaks/labels length mismatch error.
  color_limits <- c(min(nes_min, 0), max(nes_max, 0))
  
  brk <- c(nes_min, 0, nes_max)
  lbl <- c(as.character(round(nes_min, 1)), "0", as.character(round(nes_max, 1)))
  
  # Remove duplicates (e.g., when nes_min == nes_max, or nes_min/nes_max == 0)
  dup <- !duplicated(round(brk, 10))
  brk <- brk[dup]
  lbl <- lbl[dup]
  
  # Build plot (matching panther_baseline_manuscript.qmd style)
  p <- plot_df %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = NES, y = n, size = neg_log_p, color = NES)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "#495057") +
    geom_segment(aes(xend = 0), linewidth = 1) +
    geom_point() +
    scale_size(range = point_size_range) +
    scale_color_gradient2(low = low_color, mid = mid_color, high = high_color, midpoint = 0,
                          limits = color_limits,
                          breaks = brk, labels = lbl,
                          guide = guide_colorbar(barwidth = 8, barheight = 0.5)) +
    geom_text(data = subset(plot_df, NES > 0),
              aes(x = -0.02, y = n, label = display_name),
              color = subset(plot_df, NES > 0)$text_col,
              hjust = 1, inherit.aes = FALSE, size = text_size_val) +
    geom_text(data = subset(plot_df, NES < 0),
              aes(x = 0.02, y = n, label = display_name),
              color = subset(plot_df, NES < 0)$text_col,
              hjust = 0, inherit.aes = FALSE, size = text_size_val) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
          text = element_text(size = base_text_size),
          axis.text.y = element_blank(),
          legend.position = "top",
          legend.title.position = "top",
          plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
          plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 10, lineheight = 1.2),
          panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
          plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
          legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
          legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA)) +
    labs(y = NULL, x = "NES",
         color = "NES", size = "-log10(p)",
         caption = base_caption,
         title = cell_name) +
    scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(left_expand, right_expand)))
  
  return(p)
}

```


# Associate EC with CMR parameters

```{r}
run_nebula_var <- function(var, 
                           seurat_obj, 
                           ncore = 4) {
  meta <- seurat_obj@meta.data

  # 1. keep only cells with a non-missing value for THIS imaging variable
  keep <- !is.na(meta[[var]])
  if (sum(keep) < 2 || dplyr::n_distinct(meta$record_id[keep]) < 2) {
    return(NULL)  # too few cells / subjects to fit
  }

  meta_v   <- meta[keep, , drop = FALSE]
  counts_v <- round(GetAssayData(seurat_obj, layer = "counts"))
  counts_v <- counts_v[, keep, drop = FALSE]
  offset_v <- seurat_obj$pooled_offset[keep]

  pred <- model.matrix(reformulate(var), data = meta_v)

  data_g <- group_cell(count = counts_v, 
                       id = meta_v$record_id,
                        pred = pred, 
                       offset = offset_v)
  if (is.null(data_g)) {  # group_cell returns NULL if already grouped
    data_g <- list(count = counts_v, id = meta_v$record_id,
                   pred = pred, offset = offset_v)
  }

  nebula(count  = data_g$count,
         id     = data_g$id,
         pred   = data_g$pred,
         offset = data_g$offset,
         ncore  = ncore,
         reml   = 1,
         model  = "NBLMM")
}
```

```{r}
nebula_im <- setNames(
  lapply(im_vars, function(v) {
    message("Running NEBULA for: ", v)
    tryCatch(run_nebula_var(v, pb90_ec_cmr),
             error = function(e) {
               message("  failed: ", conditionMessage(e)); NULL
             })
  }),
  im_vars
)

conv_summary <- do.call(rbind, lapply(im_vars, function(v) {
  fit <- nebula_im[[v]]
  if (is.null(fit)) return(data.frame(var = v, prop_converged = NA_real_))
  data.frame(var = v, prop_converged = mean(fit$convergence == 1))
}))

# combine all the converged results into one df
nebula_results <- bind_rows(
  lapply(im_vars, function(v) {
    fit <- nebula_im[[v]]
    if (is.null(fit)) return(NULL)

    s   <- fit$summary
    eff <- c(logFC = paste0("logFC_", v),
             se    = paste0("se_",    v),
             p     = paste0("p_",     v))

    data.frame(
      var       = v,
      gene      = s$gene,
      logFC     = s[[eff["logFC"]]],
      se        = s[[eff["se"]]],
      p         = s[[eff["p"]]],
      converged = fit$convergence == 1,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ) %>%
      filter(converged) %>%
      mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p, method = "BH")) %>%   # BH within each variable
      select(-converged)
  })
)
nebula_results <- nebula_results %>% 
  filter(!(var == "rv_hr" & logFC < -3)) # exclude outlier due to low expression

# save NEBULA results as csv
s3write_using_region(nebula_results,
                     FUN = write.csv,
                     bucket = "scrna", 
                     object = "Projects/EC CMR/Results/cmr_ec_nebula_compiled.csv",
                     row.names = F,
                     region = "")

```

```{r}
# individual plots
for (v in unique(nebula_results$var)) {
  fdr_p <- plot_volcano_im(filter(nebula_results, var == v), var_name = v,
                       p_col = "fdr",
                       positive_text = "", negative_text = "")
  p <- plot_volcano_im(filter(nebula_results, var == v), var_name = v,
                       positive_text = "", negative_text = "")
    
  s3write_using_region(fdr_p,
                       FUN = ggsave,
                       bucket = "scrna",
                       region = "",
                       object = paste0("Projects/EC CMR/Results/Figures/", v, "_fdr.png"),
                       width = 7, 
                       height = 5, 
                       dpi = 300, 
                       bg = "transparent")
  
  s3write_using_region(p,
                       FUN = ggsave,
                       bucket = "scrna",
                       region = "",
                       object = paste0("Projects/EC CMR/Results/Figures/", v, ".png"),
                       width = 7, 
                       height = 5, 
                       dpi = 300, 
                       bg = "transparent")
}

# combined faceted plot
p_facet <- plot_volcano_im_facet(nebula_results)

s3write_using_region(p_facet,
                     FUN = ggsave,
                     bucket = "scrna",
                     region = "",
                     object = paste0("Projects/EC CMR/Results/Figures/cmr_faceted_volcano.png"),
                     width = 16, 
                     height = 16, 
                     dpi = 300, 
                     bg = "transparent")

fdr_facet <- plot_volcano_im_facet(nebula_results,
                                   p_col = "fdr")

s3write_using_region(fdr_facet,
                     FUN = ggsave,
                     bucket = "scrna",
                     region = "",
                     object = paste0("Projects/EC CMR/Results/Figures/cmr_faceted_volcano_fdr.png"),
                     width = 16, 
                     height = 16, 
                     dpi = 300, 
                     bg = "transparent")
```

# GSEA
```{r}
hallmark_df <- msigdbr(species = "Homo sapiens", collection = "H")
pathways_H  <- split(hallmark_df$gene_symbol, hallmark_df$gs_name)

gsea_results <- map_dfr(unique(nebula_results$var), function(v) {
  res <- run_gsea_var(filter(nebula_results, var == v), pathways_H)
  res$var <- v
  res
}) %>%
  relocate(var) %>%
  arrange(var, padj) %>%
  mutate(leadingEdge = vapply(leadingEdge, paste, collapse = ", ", FUN.VALUE = character(1)))

# save GSEA results as csv
s3write_using_region(gsea_results,
                     FUN = write.csv,
                     bucket = "scrna", 
                     object = "Projects/EC CMR/Results/cmr_ec_hallmark_compiled.csv",
                     row.names = F,
                     region = "")

# create lollipop plots
for (v in unique(nebula_results$var)) {

  df_v <- nebula_results %>%
    filter(var == v) %>%
    dplyr::rename(Gene = gene)            # function reads df$Gene, you have `gene`

  p <- make_gsea_lollipop(
    df          = df_v,
    logfc_col   = "logFC",
    pval_col    = "p",
    cell_name   = "EC",                         # -> caption "Cell type: EC" (correct)
    pathways    = pathways_H,
    test_name   = paste0("~ ", v),
    cohort_text = "CMR",
    reference   = "hallmark"
  )

  if (is.null(p)) {                             # too few genes or no sig pathways
    message("Skipping ", v, ": no lollipop (NULL returned)")
    next
  }

  # the function titles by cell_name; retitle so each figure names its variable
  ttl <- if (v %in% names(im_labels)) gsub("\n", " ", im_labels[[v]]) else v
  p <- p + labs(title = ttl)

  s3write_using_region(
    p, FUN = ggsave,
    bucket = "scrna", region = "",
    object = paste0("Projects/EC CMR/Results/Figures/gsea/hallmark_", v, ".png"),
    width = 10, height = 10, dpi = 300, bg = "transparent"
  )
} 
```

# Compile findings

```{r}
# =====================================================================
# Endothelial-cell transcript x cardiac-MRI association plots
#   Input 1: gsea_results   (cols: var, pathway, NES, padj, ...)
#   Input 2: nebula_results (cols: var, gene, logFC, se, p, fdr)
# Plot A: NES heatmap (pathway themes x CMR domains)  <- the main one
# Plot B: # FDR-significant genes per CMR variable
# =====================================================================

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Define the grouping that gives the slide its structure.
#    Edit these to show whichever pathways / CMR variables you want.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------

# Pathway -> theme (row blocks). Keep order = display order.
pathway_theme <- tribble(
  ~pathway,                                   ~theme,
  "HALLMARK_OXIDATIVE_PHOSPHORYLATION",       "Metabolic / mitochondrial",
  "HALLMARK_MTORC1_SIGNALING",                "Metabolic / mitochondrial",
  "HALLMARK_FATTY_ACID_METABOLISM",           "Metabolic / mitochondrial",
  "HALLMARK_ADIPOGENESIS",                    "Metabolic / mitochondrial",
  "HALLMARK_XENOBIOTIC_METABOLISM",           "Metabolic / mitochondrial",
  "HALLMARK_TNFA_SIGNALING_VIA_NFKB",         "Immune / inflammatory",
  "HALLMARK_INTERFERON_GAMMA_RESPONSE",       "Immune / inflammatory",
  "HALLMARK_INTERFERON_ALPHA_RESPONSE",       "Immune / inflammatory",
  "HALLMARK_IL6_JAK_STAT3_SIGNALING",         "Immune / inflammatory",
  "HALLMARK_COMPLEMENT",                       "Immune / inflammatory",
  "HALLMARK_HYPOXIA",                          "Endothelial injury / stress",
  "HALLMARK_APOPTOSIS",                        "Endothelial injury / stress",
  "HALLMARK_COAGULATION",                      "Endothelial injury / stress",
  "HALLMARK_REACTIVE_OXYGEN_SPECIES_PATHWAY",  "Endothelial injury / stress"
)

# CMR variable -> domain (column blocks) + a pretty label.
var_domain <- tribble(
  ~var,                ~domain,           ~label,
  "af_pwv",            "Vascular",        "PWV",
  "af_high5pctwss",    "Vascular",        "WSS (hi 5%)",
  "mv_flow_e",         "Diastolic",       "MV E",
  "mv_flow_a",         "Diastolic",       "MV A",
  "mv_flow_ea",        "Diastolic",       "MV E/A",
  "lvef",              "Systolic/strain", "LVEF",
  "gls",               "Systolic/strain", "GLS",
  "rv_stroke_volume",  "Systolic/strain", "RV SV",
  "lved_mass",         "Mass/vol",        "LVED mass",
  "lvedv",             "Mass/vol",        "LVEDV",
  "tt1",               "Tissue map",      "T1",
  "tt2",               "Tissue map",      "T2*"
)

theme_levels  <- unique(pathway_theme$theme)
domain_levels <- unique(var_domain$domain)

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Build the heatmap data frame
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------
heat_df <- gsea_results %>%
  inner_join(pathway_theme, by = "pathway") %>%
  inner_join(var_domain,    by = "var") %>%
  mutate(
    # readable pathway names: drop HALLMARK_, underscores -> spaces, Title Case
    pathway_lab = pathway %>%
      str_remove("^HALLMARK_") %>%
      str_replace_all("_", " ") %>%
      str_to_title(),
    star  = if_else(padj < 0.05, "*", ""),
    theme = factor(theme,  levels = theme_levels),
    domain = factor(domain, levels = domain_levels)
  )

# Lock row/column display order
path_lab_levels <- pathway_theme %>%
  mutate(lab = str_to_title(str_replace_all(str_remove(pathway, "^HALLMARK_"), "_", " "))) %>%
  pull(lab)
heat_df <- heat_df %>%
  mutate(
    pathway_lab = factor(pathway_lab, levels = rev(path_lab_levels)), # rev so first is on top
    label       = factor(label, levels = var_domain$label)
  )

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------
# 3. Plot A: the NES heatmap
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------
p_heat <- ggplot(heat_df, aes(label, pathway_lab, fill = NES)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_text(aes(label = star), color = "black", size = 5, vjust = 0.78) +
  facet_grid(theme ~ domain, scales = "free", space = "free", switch = "y") +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#219ebc", mid = "white", high = "#d00000",
    midpoint = 0, limits = c(-3, 3),
    oob = scales::squish, name = "NES"
  ) +
  labs(
    # title    = "Endothelial-cell programs associated with cardiac MRI phenotypes",
    caption = "* padj < 0.05",
    x = NULL, y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x      = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid       = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing    = unit(2, "pt"),
    strip.text.x     = element_text(face = "bold", size = 9),
    strip.text.y.left = element_text(face = "bold", angle = 90, hjust = 0.5),
    strip.placement  = "outside",
    plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position  = "right",
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA)
  )

s3write_using_region(
  p_heat, FUN = ggsave,
  bucket = "scrna", region = "",
  object = "Projects/EC CMR/Results/Figures/gsea/ec_cmr_nes_heatmap.png",
  width = 10, height = 7.5, dpi = 300, bg = "transparent"
)

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------
# 4. Plot B (optional): FDR-significant gene count per CMR variable
#    Justifies focusing on diastolic function.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------
bar_df <- nebula_results %>%
  filter(fdr < 0.05) %>%
  dplyr::count(var, name = "n_sig") %>%
  left_join(var_domain, by = "var") %>%
  mutate(
    label  = coalesce(label, var),
    domain = factor(coalesce(domain, "Other"))
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_sig))

p_bar <- ggplot(bar_df, aes(reorder(label, n_sig), n_sig, fill = domain)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "FDR-significant EC genes per cardiac MRI phenotype",
    x = NULL, y = "# Genes (FDR < 0.05)", fill = "Domain"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
        plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
        legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA))


s3write_using_region(
  p_bar, FUN = ggsave,
  bucket = "scrna", region = "",
  object = "Projects/EC CMR/Results/Figures/gsea/ec_cmr_siggene_bar.png",
  width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300, bg = "transparent"
)
```
